Describe the key visual transitions and subjects shown throughout the video timeline.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a green geometric logo appears; at 4s, white text reading BRICK CURTAIN HOUSE replaces it; at 8s, an exterior view of a red brick house is shown; at 12s, a person kneels at an indoor altar; at 18s, a person sits on a sofa with a black dog.
